posts.title: Why Reels Still Win in 2025 (And How to Make Yours Convert)
posts.author: Mia Chen
posts.excerpt: Short-form video isn't going anywhere. But the game has changed. Here's what's actually working on Reels right now — and why most brands are still doing it wrong.
posts.body:
## The State of Reels in 2025

Short-form video has dominated the conversation for years. But in 2025, the brands winning on Reels aren't the ones making the most polished content — they're the ones who understand one fundamental truth: **the algorithm rewards watch time, and watch time is earned in the first two seconds.**

## Why Reels Are Still the Highest-Leverage Format

Despite noise about new platforms, Instagram Reels continues to deliver the highest organic reach of any content type on Meta. Our data across 30+ client accounts shows an average reach 3.2× higher for Reels compared to static posts.

## The 2-Second Hook Formula

Formats that consistently outperform:

- Leading with a bold, contrarian statement
- Opening mid-action — skip the title cards
- Addressing the viewer directly
- Creating visual contrast in the first frame

## The Takeaway

Reels aren't going anywhere. But the era of 'just post a lot' is over. Every Reel needs a clear hook, a purpose, and a call to action.
